A [[Forest/Legends|forested]] '''moon''' [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="RSBF" /> [[Rhigar/Legends|Rhigar]]—which was part of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]]—in the [[Rhigar system]], within the [[Rata Nebula/Legends|Rata Nebula]].<ref name="TEA" /> In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="Date">The events of ''[[Red Sky, Blue Flame]]'' take place in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]].</ref> during a [[Battle of Rhigar|battle]] between the [[Empire of the Hand]] and a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] on Rhigar, the wooded satellite bordered the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Asdroni]] while the other and [[Rhigar 3]] were close together, making the sky as bright as it was in twilight.<ref name="RSBF" />

==Behind the scenes==
The moon appeared in the [[2001]] short story ''[[Red Sky, Blue Flame]]'', which was written by [[Elaine Cunningham]] and published within the [[Star Wars Gamer 7|seventh]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine.<ref name="RSBF" />

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|7|Red Sky, Blue Flame}} {{1st}}
